feedback: Outgoing tab successfully implemented with proper filtering (lines 223-226 in useAssignmentRequests.tsx filters by requested_by === user?.uid)
Cancel functionality properly implemented with confirmation dialog (lines 71-83, 270-286 in TransfersList.tsx)
RTL support is comprehensive with dir prop passed to Tabs, TabsList, and Cards (lines 178-180, 93 in TransfersList.tsx)
All translations added for new UI elements (transfers.outgoing, transfers.cancel, transfers.cancelTransfer, etc. in translations.ts)
Cancel button uses logical CSS properties (me-2/ms-2 based on dir) and has data-testid for testing (line 151 in TransfersList.tsx)
Permission check missing: cancelRequest function does not verify that the user is the original requester before allowing cancellation
Test coverage is incomplete: existing tests check for outgoing tab existence but don't test actual cancel functionality end-to-end
The cancelRequest implementation reuses rejectRequest logic which is correct (sets status to 'rejected' and equipment status to 'serviceable')
Outgoing transfers filter correctly excludes transfers where recipient has already approved (recipient_approved check on line 216)
Badge count displays correctly for outgoing transfers with RTL-aware margin (lines 191-193)
Code follows established patterns from incoming transfers implementation
Missing validation: no check to prevent canceling already approved/rejected transfers in the UI layer
The Cancel dialog confirmation message could be more specific about consequences
Good use of submitting state to prevent double-clicks during cancel operation
Icon spacing uses logical properties correctly (ms-2/me-2 based on dir on line 151)
nextSteps: Add permission check in cancelRequest to verify user?.uid matches request.requested_by
Add E2E test that creates an outgoing transfer and verifies cancel functionality works end-to-end
Add validation to disable cancel button for transfers that are already approved or rejected
Consider adding a toast/notification when viewing an outgoing transfer that was rejected by recipient
Add unit tests for the outgoingTransfers filtering logic in useAssignmentRequests
Update cancel dialog to show equipment name and destination for better UX
Add test case to verify non-initiators cannot cancel transfers (permission boundary test)
Consider showing recipient approval status on outgoing transfers for better transparency
